intro: Oplismenus crus-galli, commonly known as barley grass, is a perennial grass species native to Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its health benefits, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and protect against oxidative stress.
